title: Fire congress workflow for Ferrus debate

log.context: Fire congress workflow for Ferrus debate

The CongressWorkflow started successfully. A couple of import path issues were encountered along the way:

1. `uv run` failed because `temporalio` wasn't available in the uv environment — the system Python at `/home/clungus/.local/lib/python3.12/site-packages/` had it instead.
2. `WorkflowIDReusePolicy` needed to be imported from `temporalio.common`, not `temporalio.client`.

After those fixes, the workflow fired cleanly against Temporal at `localhost:7233` on task queue `listings-queue` with th...(truncated)
